title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Britannia Industries Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Britannia Industries Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
We at Britannia Industries Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Raipur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Britannia Industries Asia Pacific Associates:
Britannia Industries Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Britannia Industries Asia Pacific Associates!
